members.name: GetExpandMargin
members.summary: Returns the expand margin size of the specified [enum Side].

members.name: GetTextureMargin
members.summary: Returns the margin size of the specified [enum Side].

members.name: SetExpandMargin
members.signature: public void SetExpandMargin(int margin, float size)
members.summary: Sets the expand margin to [param size] pixels for the specified [enum Side].

members.name: SetExpandMarginAll
members.summary: Sets the expand margin to [param size] pixels for all sides.

members.name: SetTextureMargin
members.signature: public void SetTextureMargin(int margin, float size)
members.summary: Sets the margin to [param size] pixels for the specified [enum Side].

members.name: SetTextureMarginAll
members.summary: Sets the margin to [param size] pixels for all sides.

members.name: AxisStretchHorizontal
members.summary: Controls how the stylebox's texture will be stretched or tiled horizontally.

members.name: AxisStretchVertical
members.summary: Controls how the stylebox's texture will be stretched or tiled vertically.

members.name: DrawCenter
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the nine-patch texture's center tile will be drawn.

members.name: ExpandMarginBottom
members.summary: Expands the bottom margin of this style box when drawing, causing it to be drawn larger than requested.

members.name: ExpandMarginLeft
members.summary: Expands the left margin of this style box when drawing, causing it to be drawn larger than requested.

members.name: ExpandMarginRight
members.summary: Expands the right margin of this style box when drawing, causing it to be drawn larger than requested.

members.name: ExpandMarginTop
members.summary: Expands the top margin of this style box when drawing, causing it to be drawn larger than requested.

members.name: ModulateColor
members.summary: Modulates the color of the texture when this style box is drawn.

members.name: RegionRect
members.summary: The region to use from the [member texture]. This is equivalent to first wrapping the [member texture] in an [AtlasTexture] with the same region. If empty ([code]Rect2(0, 0, 0, 0)[/code]), the whole [member texture] is used.

members.name: Texture
members.summary: The texture to use when drawing this style box.

members.name: TextureMarginBottom
members.summary: Increases the bottom margin of the 3×3 texture box. A higher value means more of the source texture is considered to be part of the bottom border of the 3×3 box. This is also the value used as fallback for [member StyleBox.content_margin_bottom] if it is negative.

members.name: TextureMarginLeft
members.summary: Increases the left margin of the 3×3 texture box. A higher value means more of the source texture is considered to be part of the left border of the 3×3 box. This is also the value used as fallback for [member StyleBox.content_margin_left] if it is negative.

members.name: TextureMarginRight
members.summary: Increases the right margin of the 3×3 texture box. A higher value means more of the source texture is considered to be part of the right border of the 3×3 box. This is also the value used as fallback for [member StyleBox.content_margin_right] if it is negative.

members.name: TextureMarginTop
members.summary: Increases the top margin of the 3×3 texture box. A higher value means more of the source texture is considered to be part of the top border of the 3×3 box. This is also the value used as fallback for [member StyleBox.content_margin_top] if it is negative.

values.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_STRETCH
values.summary: Stretch the stylebox's texture. This results in visible distortion unless the texture size matches the stylebox's size perfectly.

values.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE
values.summary: Repeats the stylebox's texture to match the stylebox's size according to the nine-patch system.

values.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE_FIT
values.summary: Repeats the stylebox's texture to match the stylebox's size according to the nine-patch system. Unlike [constant AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE], the texture may be slightly stretched to make the nine-patch texture tile seamlessly.

constants.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_STRETCH
constants.summary: Stretch the stylebox's texture. This results in visible distortion unless the texture size matches the stylebox's size perfectly.

constants.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE
constants.summary: Repeats the stylebox's texture to match the stylebox's size according to the nine-patch system.

constants.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE_FIT
constants.summary: Repeats the stylebox's texture to match the stylebox's size according to the nine-patch system. Unlike [constant AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE], the texture may be slightly stretched to make the nine-patch texture tile seamlessly.
